issues.title: Unsafe forced cancellation via async thread exception injection
issues.risk: Can interrupt arbitrary frames, skip cleanup/finalization, and leave inconsistent artifacts/runtime state.
issues.recommended_fix: Remove force-stop path and rely on cooperative cancellation with a top-level worker try/finally cleanup guard.

issues.title: Dry-run does not fully mirror start preconditions
issues.risk: Dry-run may report OK while start fails on missing base checkpoint or variant metadata.
issues.recommended_fix: Add the missing preflight checks to dry-run and return explicit failure codes/details.

issues.title: Experimental Ultralytics patch is process-global and reused by normal YOLO inference
issues.risk: Patch side-effects can impact non-head-graft inference/training paths.
issues.recommended_fix: Isolate patch activation to head-graft contexts or gate with explicit runtime compatibility mode.

issues.title: Bundle endpoint may silently return incomplete package
issues.risk: Users may receive incomplete bundle with no precondition error.
issues.recommended_fix: Fail with precondition error when required artifacts are missing and include missing list.

issues.title: Head-graft UI payload parsing drops explicit zero values
issues.risk: Explicit 0 values are coerced to null and replaced by backend defaults.
issues.recommended_fix: Use finite-number parsing helper instead of truthy-coalescing for numeric fields.

issues.title: No dedicated automated tests for head-graft path
issues.risk: Regression probability remains elevated for patch-heavy flow.
issues.recommended_fix: Add non-GPU tests for dry-run parity, YAML generation, cancellation semantics, and bundle integrity.
